title: scutellaria paulsenii
intro: Scutellaria paulsenii, also known as Huang-Qin, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria paulsenii include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of Scutellaria paulsenii include teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as respiratory infections and digestive issues.
